creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Omar,

Fetch fails:
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/stack-dependencies-1.6.1.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/stack-dependencies-1.6.1.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1


Could you please correct this?

Thanks,
Yuri
